analysis_boundary.why: no chart type specified -- pie is a reasonable default for distribution overview

analysis_boundary.input: How long do incidents take to resolve?
analysis_boundary.why: duration question without chart type -- box shows distribution
service question without chart type -- bar is the default

analysis_boundary.input: Show me a breakdown of causes by vendor
analysis_boundary.why: 'by vendor' should trigger stacked, not pie or bar

analysis_boundary.input: How has resolution time changed over the months?
analysis_boundary.why: 'over the months' implies trend -- could also be bar per year

analysis_boundary.input: Compare the service impact across all cloud providers
analysis_boundary.why: 'compare across providers' implies stacked vendor comparison

analysis_boundary.input: Show me the average time to fix incidents each year
analysis_boundary.why: 'each year' suggests yearly aggregation -- bar, not line or box

analysis_boundary.input: What is the proportion of each root cause?
analysis_boundary.why: 'proportion' naturally maps to pie chart for showing parts of a whole

analysis_boundary.input: Show me how service categories differ between AWS and Azure

analysis_boundary.why: 'overview' is ambiguous -- bar showing yearly mean is a reasonable summary
